creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mat
Date: Fri Nov 15 16:41:49 2013
New Revision: 333887
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333887

Log:
  Add p5-Test-If 0.01, test only if.
  
  PR:		ports/180302
  Submitted by:	Anes Mukhametov <anes@anes.su>

Added:
  head/devel/p5-Test-If/
  head/devel/p5-Test-If/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Test-If/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Test-If/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Test-If/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 16:37:49 2013	(r333886)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 16:41:49 2013	(r333887)
@@ -2810,6 +2810,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-Test-HasVersion
     SUBDIR += p5-Test-HexString
     SUBDIR += p5-Test-Identity
+    SUBDIR += p5-Test-If
     SUBDIR += p5-Test-InDistDir
     SUBDIR += p5-Test-Inline
     SUBDIR += p5-Test-Inter

Added: head/devel/p5-Test-If/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-If/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 16:41:49 2013	(r333887)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Anes Mukhametov <anes@anes.su>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	Test-If
+PORTVERSION=	0.01
+CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	anes@anes.su
+COMMENT=	Test only if
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-lib-abs>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-lib-abs
+
+USES=	perl5
+USE_PERL5=	configure
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/p5-Test-If/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-If/distinfo	Fri Nov 15 16:41:49 2013	(r333887)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Test-If-0.01.tar.gz) = aaf2dff80edbb00bf8b1b935755e312a26049850cd284ec252ea5d3864b4af43
+SIZE (Test-If-0.01.tar.gz) = 23170

Added: head/devel/p5-Test-If/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-If/pkg-descr	Fri Nov 15 16:41:49 2013	(r333887)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Test only if ...
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Test-If/

Added: head/devel/p5-Test-If/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-If/pkg-plist	Fri Nov 15 16:41:49 2013	(r333887)
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Test::If.3.gz
+%%SITE_PERL%%/Test/If.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Test/If/.packlist
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Test/If
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Test
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Test
